positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed psychedelic botanical arrangement centered in a deep indigo and emerald palette. The main subject is stylized, glowing ethereal foliage mixed with crescent moons and nebulae elements. The style should be neo-victorian gothic mixed with luminous abstract art, featuring sharp, clean silhouettes and strong, dramatic contrast. Lighting must simulate bioluminescence and cosmic glow, using accents of metallic gold and vibrant sapphire blue. The composition must be centered and tile-friendly, making it ideal for a high-quality apparel print design. Minimalist, decorative, abstract fantasy.
